data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for contingency planning (backup venues).
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that contingency planning, specifically for backup venues, is satisfied. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that backup venues are part of the booking process or that they are reserved in case of adverse conditions. The linked use case mentions that an indoor backup is automatically reserved, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating this functionality in the current state of the saga.
gaps: No evidence of backup venue reservation process.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for backup venue reservation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that verify the backup venue reservation process.
